name: memory-levara
description: Persistent memory backed by Levara /api/v1/memories. Replaces memory-lancedb with REST calls to the GPU host's vector DB.

levaraUrl.description: Levara HTTP API base URL (e.g. http://10.23.0.64:8080)

jwtToken.description: Long-lived JWT for the picoclaw service principal

fallbackFile.description: NDJSON outbox path for writes when Levara is unreachable
